howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Just 3 simple steps to find the best electricity plan
howItWorks.step1Desc: Enter your ZIP code and we'll show you all available electricity plans in your area.
howItWorks.step2Desc: View and compare plans from multiple providers. Filter by price, term, and energy type.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Select the best plan for you and complete enrollment in just a few minutes.

testimonials.title: What Our Customers Say
testimonials.subtitle: Over 500 families and businesses trust Saigon Power
testimonials.t1Text: Thanks to Saigon Power, I save $35 every month. The Vietnamese-language service is incredibly helpful and easy to understand.
testimonials.t2Text: They helped me find a great electricity plan for my salon, saving nearly $200/month. Highly satisfied!
testimonials.t3Text: They reminded me to renew my contract just in time, saving me from higher rates. Truly professional service.
testimonials.t4Text: Switching electricity for the first time with zero stress. The Vietnamese support team was incredibly helpful.

faqPreview.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqPreview.a1: Yes! Texas is a deregulated electricity market, so you can freely choose your provider without any prior notice.
faqPreview.q2: Will switching cause a power outage?
faqPreview.a2: No. Switching providers is completely seamless — the power lines are still managed by your local TDU (Oncor, CenterPoint, etc.).
faqPreview.a3: Just 5-10 minutes to complete online enrollment. Service typically begins within 1-3 business days.
faqPreview.q4: Does Saigon Power charge a fee?
faqPreview.a4: No! Our consultation and comparison service is completely free. We earn a commission from providers.
